era_context: Mid-second millennium BCE. New Kingdom Egypt under Thutmose III, Hittite Empire in Anatolia, Shang Dynasty in China, Vedic period in South Asia. A period of relative stability and consolidation across major civilizations.
disconfirming_evidence: No events are attested for 1949 BCE.
historiographic_note: 1949 BCE is not documented in surviving historical sources. The year is historically invisible in the archaeological and textual record.
